articles.description:
Taco Bell's Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito features grilled marinated steak, shredded lettuce, Avocado Ranch Sauce, pico de gallo, crunchy fiesta strips, shredded cheddar cheese, and Creamy Chipotle Sauce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla and grilled.

I got one for $3.29 (most areas have them for $3, though).
I don't typically like lettuce in a burrito as it tends to wilt in short order when sealed in a flour tortilla. However, the only hot/warm ingredient in the Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito is the steak, which wasn't exactly plentiful, so the lettuce managed to keep a decent amount of texture. The watery crunch of the lettuce was buoyed by the heartier crunch of the fiesta strips, while the pico de gallo added acidity and flavor.
The grilling of the tortilla added a extra layer of toasty flavor but not as much texture as you'd think.
Two sauces was a bit excessiveand both sauces were mayo based so there was some overlap. The cheese added an extra richenss and a mild flavor.



The steak was tender, moist, and lightly seasoned but there was just barely enough to catch a bit of meatiness in most bites.
Still, Taco Bell's Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito is one of two fast-food menu items that gets you some steak for $3 right now (the other is Taco Bell's Cheesy Melty Grilled Steak Burrito) and between the two, I enjoyed this one more as the lighter ingredients let the steak shine a little more.
Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito
Calories - 520
Fat - 30g (Saturated Fat - 7g)
Sodium - 990mg
Carbs - 48g (Sugar - 4g)
Protein - 16g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Taco Bell - Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito

Del Taco has upgraded its El Big Boxes with bigger burritos that each weigh over half a pound. The fast-food chain also brings back the Orange Cream Shake and Funnel Cake Fries for a limited time.

The El Big Box changes come as the chain increases the size of some of its burritos to over half a pound, including:
- ½ lb. Combo Beef & Bean Burrito - Seasoned beef, slow-cooked beans, house-grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla.
- ½ lb. Beef & Cheddar Burrito - Seasoned beef, house-grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla.
- ½ lb. Grilled Chicken Burrito - Grilled marinated chicken, house-grated cheddar cheese, shredded lettuce, secret sauce, and diced tomatoes, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. 
- ½ lb. 8 Layer Veggie Burrito - Slow-cooked beans made from scratch, cilantro lime rice, house-made guacamole, house-grated cheddar cheese, shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, zesty red sauce, and sour cream, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla.
- ½ lb. Bean & Cheese Burrito - Made from scratch, slow-cooked beans, house-grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red or tangy green sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla.
The El Big Boxes are the same as before, only with a bigger burrito. The options include:
- $5 Clásico - A Combo Beef & Bean Burrito, a Mini Quesadilla, Crinkle-Cut Fries, and a 16-oz drink.
- $7 Mex Faves - A Combo Beef & Bean Burrito, a Grilled Chicken Taco, a soft Snack Taco, a Mini Quesadilla, and a 16-oz drink.
- $9 Ameri-Mex (pictured) - A Double Del Cheeseburger, a Bean & Cheese Burrito (with a choice of red or green sauce), a soft Snack Taco, Crinkle-Cut Fries, and a 16-oz drink.
The Orange Cream Shake is a vanilla shake blended with Fanta Orange, while the Funnel Cake Fries are deep-fried funnel cake batter shaped into a fry and covered in powdered sugar.
Photo via Del Taco.

articles.description:
Pizza Hut's Nashville Hot Chicken Crafted Flatzz is a "hand-crafted" personal pizza topped with crispy-fried boneless chicken pieces, spicy Nashville Hot seasoning, fresh onions, mozzarella, and pickle ranch sauce.

The pizza costs $5 before 5PM and $6.99 after at my local Pizza Hut.



Judging by the size and shape, I would guess the Crafted Fratzz is made by taking half the dough from a small hand-tossed pizza and stretching it out into a thin, oval shape that's about twice the size of the chain's personal pan pizza. It's cut into eight small pieces, and each piece can be eaten in one large bite or two to three normal bites.



The crust was thin and airy with a really nice crispiness at the surface and just a bit of chew to the soft crumb. It did not have the cracker-like feel of the chain's Thin 'N Crispy crust. There was a decent amount of cheese on top, and it had managed a bit of a cheese pull.
The boneless chicken bites were covered in a fairly thin, crispy coating. They were similar in size to a large marble, and there was exactly one piece of chicken on each slice.



The Nashville Hot seasoning was tasty with a strong heat and just a touch of sweetness. The heat came on fast but didn't linger for very long. It was sprinkled all over the pizza. The pickle ranch (does not contain pickles but is flavored with pickle spices, flavors, and herbs) balanced it out nicely with a creamy tang and a hint of herbs. The onions were sweet with a watery crunch.



Overall, Pizza Hut's Nashville Hot Chicken Crafted Flatzz was really nice, with a good mix of heat, sweetness, creamy richness, and acidity to go with a crispy crust. The price is affordable as well. I'm not a fan of the name, though, which I guess is a portmanteau of "flat" and "pizza."
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Pizza Hut - Nashville Hot Chicken Crafted Flatzz

Heading into fall 2025, Pringles welcomes a new Smoky lineup along with new Pringles Mingles flavors.

The new Pringles Smokey lineup includes:
- New Pringles Smoky Bacon - Featuring notes of hickory smoke and pork for a "savory wood-fired smoky bacon taste."
- New Pringles Smoky Mesquite BBQ - Featuring a tangy barbecue sweetness that delivers a "familiar barbeque flavor with a smoked twist."
- New Pringles Smoky Cheddar - Offering a "mild, sweet applewood smokiness" paired with a "bold and creamy" cheddar cheese flavor.
- New Pringles Sharp White Cheddar - A combination of "rich and slightly nutty flavors with a touch of acidity" that captures the flavor of aged white cheddar cheese.
Pringles Mingles, the brand's line of puffed snacks, gets two new additions: 
- New Pringles Mingles Cinnamon & Sugar - The brand's first sweet flavor since 2016 offers " warm notes of cinnamon complemented by sugary sweetness." It comes in special limited-edition holiday packaging.
- New Pringles Mingles Jalapeno & Queso - A pairing of a "creamy queso cheese taste" with "a fresh jalapeno flavor."
Pringles' new Smoky lineup and new Pringles Mingles flavors arrive on store shelves nationwide starting this month.
Photo via Pringles.
Read more at Brand Eating!

Alongside its Crafted Flatzz, Pizza Hut has introduced two new Crispy Chicken Pizzas to the menu for a limited time: the Nashville Hot Chicken Pizza and the Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza.

Both pizzas feature new Crispy Chicken and come with a dipping cup of new Pickle Ranch or Ultimate Ranch. Pickle Ranch is a ranch sauce flavored with pickle spices, flavors, and herbs (it does not contain pickles), while Ultimate Ranch is a tangy buttermilk ranch sauce.
The Nashville Hot Chicken Pizza features a base of Pickle Ranch and pizza cheese, topped with crispy chicken, onions, Nashville Hot seasoning, and a drizzle of Pickle Ranch.
The Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza features a base of Ultimate Ranch and pizza cheese, topped with crispy chicken, bacon, and a drizzle of Ultimate Ranch.
Both pizzas are available now at participating locations nationwide for a limited time through November 9, 2025.
According to the fine print, the Crispy Chicken Pizzas are not available on Pan crust. You can get it on Tavern, Thin 'N Crispy, and Hand Tossed crusts.
Prices vary, but a medium Crispy Chicken Pizza costs $16.99 near me in Los Angeles (a large is $2 more).
Photo via Pizza Hut.
Read more at Brand Eating!

articles.description:
Papa Johns' Garlic 5-Cheese Crust Pizza is a limited-time offer featuring a hand-tossed pizza ringed at the edge with garlic-parmesan sauce and an Italian 5-cheese blend (parmesan, romano, asiago, fontina, and provolone).

A large 1-topping Garlic 5-Cheese Crust Pizza costs $12.99 (it's $11.99 in most other states) near me, but I received this courtesy of Papa Johns. I chose sausage as my one topping.



The 5-cheese blend resulted in a thin, crispy shell that covered most of the crust's edge, which was nice, as Papa John's regular crust isn't usually crispy in my experience. It offered an enjoyable, toasty cheese flavor paired with garlic.



Papa Johns previously put out a similar crust called "Garlic Parmesan Crust." The Garlic 5-Cheese Crust was heavier on the toasty cheese, though.



On a side note, the pizzas I've gotten from Papa Johns are typically evenly browned on the bottom, but this particular pizza was very light on the bottom, even though the top was quite browned and there was leopard spotting on the cheese. I'm guessing something went wrong with the bake. Maybe a temperature issue at the bottom of the oven? The result was a softer crust than usual as well as a bit of gumminess.

Besides the baking issue, the Garlic 5-Cheese Crust made for good eating. The cheese and garlic brought welcome flavor and texture to the pizza.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Papa Johns - Garlic 5-Cheese Crust Pizza

- Bacon Special Edition Gold Deluxe McCrispy - A McCrispy chicken filet, Special Edition Gold Sauce, applewood-smoked bacon, lettuce and tomato, served on a toasted potato roll.
You can also get a dipping cup of the new sauce with an order of McCrispy Strips or Chicken McNuggets.

Popeyes updates its bone-in wings to swap its spicy Ghost Pepper Wings with a mild marinated base that features "a savory blend of Louisiana seasonings." Ghost Pepper is now available as a new dry rub.

The new wing lineup includes three sauce flavors (Signature Hot, Sweet 'N Spicy, and Honey BBQ) and four new dry rubs (the previously mentioned Ghost Pepper plus Lemon Pepper, Garlic Parm, and Buffalo). Here's what you can expect from each flavor:
- Signature Hot - Cajun hot sauce with a hint of sweetness.
- Sweet 'N Spicy - A glaze featuring chili, garlic, and ginger.
- Honey BBQ - A bold, rich, and tangy Honey BBQ sauce.
- New Ghost Pepper Dry Rub - A savory blend of classic Louisiana seasonings and Ghost Pepper.
- New Lemon Pepper Dry Rub - A sweet and tangy lemon pepper seasoning.
- New Garlic Parm Dry Rub - A savory blend of parmesan cheese and garlic.
- New Buffalo Dry Rub - "Classic buffalo flavor coats a crisp wing to create the perfect mix of flavor and heat."
Popeyes' wing prices start at $5.99 for six.
To promote the wing changes, Popeyes has partnered with NFL quarterback Baker Mayfield to offer a new, limited-time deal: Starting September 4, the Monday after Baker Mayfield scores a touchdown in an NFL game this season, Popeyes reward members can get a free 6-piece wings with any $10+ digital order made via the Popeyes app or website. The promotion runs through January 4, 2026.
Photo via Popeyes.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Popeyes Updates Wings with Milder Base and New Flavors
